sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93273" key="saprofage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαπρο-φᾰγέω</orth>, <sense id="n93273.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat stinking food</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
